mapper.sql: select id, site_id, name, code, storage_type, storage_purpose, github_token, github_owner, github_repo, github_branch, github_path_prefix, r2_account_id, r2_access_key, r2_secret_key, r2_bucket, r2_public_url, oss_endpoint, oss_access_key, oss_secret_key, oss_bucket, oss_region, base_path, custom_domain, max_file_size, allowed_extensions, is_default, priority, status, del_flag, description, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from gb_storage_configs

if.test: queryMode != null and queryMode == 'related' and siteId != null

mapper.select: select s.*, c.id as category_id, c.name as category_name, c.icon as category_icon from gb_storage_configs s left join gb_categories c on s.category_id = c.id and c.del_flag = '0' where s.id = #{id} and s.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert:
insert into gb_storage_configs
site_id, name, code, storage_type, storage_purpose, category_id, github_token, github_owner, github_repo, github_branch, github_path_prefix, r2_account_id, r2_access_key, r2_secret_key, r2_bucket, r2_public_url, oss_endpoint, oss_access_key, oss_secret_key, oss_bucket, oss_region, base_path, custom_domain, max_file_size, allowed_extensions, is_default, priority, status, del_flag, description, create_by, create_time,
#{siteId}, #{name}, #{code}, #{storageType}, #{storagePurpose}, #{categoryId}, #{githubToken}, #{githubOwner}, #{githubRepo}, #{githubBranch}, #{githubPathPrefix}, #{r2AccountId}, #{r2AccessKey}, #{r2SecretKey}, #{r2Bucket}, #{r2PublicUrl}, #{ossEndpoint}, #{ossAccessKey}, #{ossSecretKey}, #{ossBucket}, #{ossRegion}, #{basePath}, #{customDomain}, #{maxFileSize}, #{allowedExtensions}, #{isDefault}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{description}, #{createBy}, #{createTime},
mapper.update: update gb_storage_configs set del_flag = '2' where id = #{id}

update gb_storage_configs set del_flag = '2' where id in
#{id}
